global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with abstract shapes and clear call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Central abstract shapes
elements.description: A large, light purple rectangle and an oval shape are positioned in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Overlaying abstract shape
elements.description: A slightly darker purple rectangle overlays the central shapes, enhancing depth and complexity.

elements.label: Top left decorative shape
elements.description: A small, light purple circle is placed in the top left corner, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom center with a white background and bold text inviting action.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A small, light purple rectangle positioned slightly above the center, adding to the abstract theme.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large black text at the top reads 'RouteBloon', making it the focal point of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap', providing context.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Offer text
elements.description: A small white text at the bottom center reads 'Get offer', encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
